enabled.description: Enable or disable the OM extension runtime.

model.description: Optional model override for OM observer/reflector/compaction calls. Accepts either 'provider/modelId' or a bare 'modelId'. Bare ids only resolve when they uniquely match an available model or already match the current session model.

headerMaxFacts.description: Maximum number of stable facts included in the hidden OM header.

headerMaxThreads.description: Maximum number of active threads included in the hidden OM header.

observerMaxTurns.description: Maximum number of recent branch turns shown to the observer after token-based window selection.

compactionMaxObservations.description: Maximum number of recent observations merged into compaction summaries.

compactionMaxReflections.description: Maximum number of reflections merged into compaction summaries.

reflectionMinObservationCount.description: Legacy compatibility knob kept on the snapshot; reflection readiness is now primarily token-based.

observationMessageTokens.description: Legacy alias for observation.messageTokens. Nested canonical fields win when both are present.

observationPreviousTokens.description: Legacy alias for observation.previousObserverTokens. Nested canonical fields win when both are present.

reflectionObservationTokens.description: Legacy alias for reflection.observationTokens. Nested canonical fields win when both are present.

headerMaxTokens.description: Token budget for the hidden OM header. Set false to disable token capping for the header.

compactionMaxTokens.description: Token budget for the OM payload appended to compaction summaries. Set false to disable token capping for the payload.

shareTokenBudget.description: When true, reserve observer token budget for new turns first, then fit previous observations into the remaining space.

messageTokens.description: Pending-turn token threshold required before the observer runs.

previousObserverTokens.description: Token budget for replaying prior observations back to the observer. Set false to disable the explicit cap.

bufferTokens.description: Observation buffer trigger. Ratios below 1 are resolved against observation.messageTokens; integers are treated as absolute token counts; false disables observation buffering.

bufferActivation.description: How much raw message pressure the observation buffer clears on activation.

blockAfter.description: Safety ratio after which OM stops deferring observer work through buffering.

observationTokens.description: Retained observation token threshold required before reflection runs.

bufferActivation.description: Fraction of the reflection threshold that triggers reflection prebuffering.

blockAfter.description: Safety ratio after which OM stops deferring reflection work through buffering.
